source.name: code
source.instructions: Paste the 'code' from the final version of your Game Changineer game here.  Your code should create a game that works, has a clear goal, and includes the three improvements you made to it.
source.command: python3 .guides/secure/freetext.py --question 'Paste the '\''code'\'' from the final version of your Game Changineer game here.  Your code should create a game that works, has a clear goal, and includes the three improvements you made to it.  The provided code should be simple english statements that describe a game.' --use-llm
